title: Calendar Navigate Event
description: Represents the event payload when navigation occurs in a calendar component, such as when moving between months or years.

props.name: component
props.description: The calendar component instance that triggered the navigation event.

props.name: isUserInteraction
props.description: Indicates whether the navigation was triggered by user interaction or programmatically.

props.name: start
props.description: The start date of the current view range.

props.name: end
props.description: The end date of the current view range.

props.name: htmlElement
props.description: The HTML element of the calendar component.
